candidate_summary: 4-course paired attention-head coupling inspired by Greek bouzouki tetrachordo. 2 octave-pairs share K with V at 2x scale, 2 unison-pairs duplicate K+V. Phase-coherent per-pair output average with α_pair = cos(φ_pair).

verifier_aggregate_assessment.rationale: No prior-art result mentions bouzouki, tetrachordo, CFAD tuning, octave-pair/unison-pair coupling, or phase-coherent per-pair averaging via cos(φ_pair). Keyword overlap is zero for the domain-specific musical instrument terms. Semantic similarity is low: while several priors (GQA, MLA, CLA, KVComm, FusedKV) share KV/heads, none implement a 4-course paired structure with mixed octave-shared-K-with-2x-V-scale plus unison-duplicated K+V and phase-coherence weighting α=cos(φ). Functional score is moderate (~0.45) because the general concept of head/KV grouping and sharing overlaps with GQA/CLA/KVComm, but the specific mechanism (mixed octave+unison pair coupling, V-scale-2x on octave pairs, phase-coherent averaging) is not disclosed. Below all three thresholds (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7).

decision_rationale: Verifier verdict PASS (0 hits aggregate); verdict-level disagreement with primary FAIL (8 hits). Verifier judged 4-course octave+unison + V-scale-2x + phase-coherent averaging specifically novel beyond GQA/MLA/CLA/KVComm shared-KV adjacencies. Flagged as R490 PassC borderline.
primary_disagreement_flag: Verdict-level disagreement: verifier PASS vs primary FAIL. R490 retained as FAIL_with_caveat_PassC_borderline.
